# Semyon Fox

> Personal portfolio of Semyon Fox — developer, swimmer, and self-hosting enthusiast. It documents projects, technical writing, games, and a CV.

The site permits crawling. Its full crawl policy and sitemap are at https://semyon.ie/robots.txt and https://semyon.ie/sitemap-index.xml.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://semyon.ie/): introduction and featured work
- [Projects](https://semyon.ie/projects): software, homelab, and university projects
- [Blog](https://semyon.ie/blog): technical writing
- [CV](https://semyon.ie/cv): experience, education, and skills
- [Games](https://semyon.ie/games): playable projects
- [Chat API documentation](https://semyon.ie/docs/chat-api): public API reference
- [Privacy](https://semyon.ie/privacy): privacy information

## Selected technical work

- [Oghma Notes](https://semyon.ie/projects): locally focused Markdown note-taking application
- [Swim monitor](https://semyon.ie/projects): swim-session tracking and related tooling
- [Home server](https://semyon.ie/projects): self-hosting and homelab work
- [Cloudflare AI watchdog](https://semyon.ie/projects): Cloudflare and AI-crawler monitoring work

## Selected writing

- [Self-hosting](https://semyon.ie/blog/self-hosting)
- [Homelab](https://semyon.ie/blog/homelab)
- [Homelab data recovery](https://semyon.ie/blog/homelab-data-recovery)
- [Hermes](https://semyon.ie/blog/hermes)
- [CTF 2026](https://semyon.ie/blog/ctf-2026)

## Machine-readable content

Most human-facing pages support Markdown content negotiation: request the page with `Accept: text/markdown` to receive its Markdown representation where available. The sitemap is the authoritative complete URL inventory.
